faqs.question: How much does carpenter ant control cost in Hewlett?
faqs.answer: Carpenter ant control services in Hewlett typically range from $350 to $2,000, depending on the severity of the infestation, colony size, and the extent of treatment required. Larger homes or properties with multiple colonies may require more extensive treatment, while smaller infestations caught early are more affordable to eliminate.

faqs.question: How can I tell if I have carpenter ants in my Hewlett home?
faqs.answer: Signs of carpenter ants include piles of wood shavings (frass) near baseboards or windows, rustling sounds inside walls, and sightings of large black ants especially during spring and summer evenings. Carpenter ants are particularly common in Hewlett homes with moisture issues, older wood structures, or properties near wooded areas and the waterfront.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to carpenter ant problems in Hewlett?

faqs.question: Do you guarantee your carpenter ant control services?
faqs.answer: Yes, we stand behind our work with a comprehensive service guarantee. If carpenter ants return between scheduled treatments, we'll come back at no additional charge. We also provide follow-up inspections to ensure complete colony elimination and offer preventative maintenance plans to keep your Hewlett property protected year-round.
